name: Dei
facts: Dei used to be a player in a PUBG Mobile e-sports community as a rusher. She prefers eating vegetables over fruit and only likes certain fruits like melon and strawberry. She dreamt of being an idol since childhood but was very shy. Before events, she must eat chocolate or anything containing sugar to stay cheerful. She loves perfumes and trying different types. She was announced as a Batch 1 member on June 7, 2024. She left the group in 2025.

name: Ute
facts: She was born in Depok, West Java, Indonesia. Ute joined the group in May 2023. Her fanbase is called Futzy. She likes listening to music. Ute plays Mobile Legends with Zea. She left the group in 2025.

name: Bya
facts: Bya was born in Bandung, West Java, Indonesia. Her official fanbase name is BYANICA. Before joining UPgirls, Bya was a radio announcer for a high school program, broadcasting the morning show before school. She tried her luck after seeing the UPgirls audition info on Instagram and debuted in 2023 as part of Batch 1. She has a sweet tooth, likes baking, and playing cooking games. She can play several instruments including drum, keyboard, and guitar. Like her emoji, she loves strawberries.

name: Ara
facts: Ara was born in Jakarta, Indonesia. She was announced as a member on May 12, 2024. Her official fanbase name is Smurfara. Ara is Aya's older sister. She left the group in 2025.

name: Cal
facts: She was born in Bogor, West Java, Indonesia. She was announced as a member on May 12, 2024. Her official fanbase name is Castile. She left the group in 2025.

name: Aca
facts: She was born in Jakarta, Indonesia. She was announced as a member on May 12, 2024. She left the group in 2025.

name: Uel
facts: She was born in Bandung, West Java, Indonesia. She was announced as a trainee member on May 12, 2024.

name: Aya
facts: She was born in Jakarta, Indonesia. She was announced as a member on May 12, 2024. She is Ara's younger sister. She left the group in 2025.

name: Rei
facts: She was born in Jakarta, Indonesia. She was announced as a member on May 12, 2024.

name: Gia
facts: Gia is from Depok, West Java, Indonesia. She was announced as a member on December 19, 2024. Gia used to do karate.

name: Kay
facts: She was announced as a member on February 13, 2025.

name: Amy
facts: She was announced as a member on February 15, 2025.

name: Aly
facts: She was announced as a member on February 22, 2025.

name: Kia
facts: She was announced as a member on March 4, 2025.

name: Ody
facts: She was announced as a Batch 2 member on May 12, 2024. Her official fanbase name is Ody Lities. She left the group on May 27, 2024. She rejoined the group in 2025 as a member of the 3rd batch.

name: Bea
facts: She was announced as a member on February 18, 2025.

name: Cia
facts: She was announced as a member on February 21, 2025. She left the group in 2025.

name: Bee
facts: She was announced as a member on February 25, 2025.

name: Ane
facts: She was announced as a member on November 12, 2024. Ane attended BPK PENABUR Bogor.

name: Yui
facts: She was announced as a member on December 2, 2025.

name: Ela
facts: She was announced as a member on November 16, 2025.

name: Kei
facts: She was announced as a member on November 16, 2025.

name: Dea
facts: She was announced as a member on November 16, 2025.

name: Rea
facts: She joined the group in June 2023. It seems that she left the group in early 2024.

name: Val
facts: She was born in Depok, West Java, Indonesia. Her hometown is Jakarta, Indonesia. She was a member of JKT48 Academy's Class B in 2020 (10th Generation). The song she auditioned with to join JKT48 was
by Frank Sinatra. Her favorite song is
by Masatoshi Ono. Val's favorite video game is Pacman. She has a younger brother. Her favorite movie is Black Swan (2010). Val left the group sometime in 2023.

name: Vey
facts: She was born in Toraja, South Sulawesi, Indonesia. She joined the group in January 2023. Her official fanbase name is Vortex.INA. She likes singing and dancing. Vey left the group in September 2024.

name: Pem
facts: Pem was born in Jakarta, Indonesia. In 2019, she joined JKT48 Academy's Class B (8th Generation), got promoted to Class A, and resigned from the group in 2020. Her nickname is Pamela. Her hobbies include sleeping and collecting Legos. She's a fan of Keshi, IU, and Rosé. She loves ice cream boba and chocolate mint ice creams. She's a dog person and makes kimchi herself. She watches K-dramas. Pem left the group in April 2022.

name: Dee
facts: She joined the group in December 2022. Dee left the group in December 2023.

name: Liz
facts: She joined the group in January 2023. Her official fanbase name is Liz Gooo. Liz left the group in November 2023.

name: Cia
facts: She joined the group in November 2023. Her official fanbase name is TerCiaCia. Cia left the group in January 2024.

name: Icy
facts: She was announced as a Batch 2 member on May 18, 2024. Icy left the group in June 2024.

name: Fia
facts: She was born in Depok, Java, Indonesia. Fia joined the group in February 2023. Her official fanbase name is Celesfia. She likes gymnastics, skating and dancing. In August 2024 she announced her departure from the group. She officially left the group on September 24, 2024.

name: Una
facts: She was born in Banjarbaru, South Kalimantan, Indonesia. She joined the group in September 2023. Her official fanbase name is U-Shine. She likes movies and dancing. On June 29, 2024, it was announced that she would go on hiatus due to health reasons. She left the group in 2025.

name: Nat
facts: Nat has been active in various lessons since childhood, including piano, vocals, classical guitar, choir, ballet, and cheerleading. She participated in auditions for SM Entertainment and passed up to the fourth stage. She also tried out for Indonesian Idol Junior Season 2 and The Voice Kids Indonesia Season 2. Her official fanbase name is Gwenchanat. She plays guitar and ukulele, likes singing, dancing, and watching movies. Some webtoons she recommends are 'The Boxer', 'My Anti-Fan', etc. She officially left the group December 2, 2025.

name: Ura
facts: Ura's career began at Kimmy Jayanti Modelling School. She was a member of JKT48 Academy's Class B in 2020 (10th Generation) but left due to internal restructuring and later debuted with UPgirls. During her JKT48 audition, she sang 'Fly Me To The Moon' by Frank Sinatra. Initially, she couldn't dance or sing but learned from coaches and teammates. Despite being an introvert, she talks a lot during MCing and fan interactions. Her official fanbase name is UraCan. She officially left the group December 3, 2025.

name: Nay
facts: Nay previously debuted with the group SUN in 2022 before joining UPgirls in 2024 as part of Batch 1. She was announced as a member on June 19, 2024. She has participated in fashion shows since age 3 but stopped due to self-confidence issues regarding her height. She can perform traditional Jaipong dance and has won jaipongan competitions. She loves chocolate, cheese, and coffee (buying iced coffee almost every day). She likes singing and attending music festivals. She once almost drowned while playing banana boat because the life jacket was too big. Her official fanbase name is Nirmanay. She left the group in late 2025.

name: Eve
facts: Eve was born in Bekasi, West Java, Indonesia. She joined the group in December 2023. Her official fanbase name is B.E.L.I.E.V.E. She was a member of Kalopsia. Eve likes cooking and dancing. She left the group in late 2025.

name: Rin
facts: Rin is the vice captain of UPgirls and is often called the 'mother' of the group. She has wanted to be an idol since childhood. Before joining UPgirls in August 2023 (debut), she was active in dance clubs in high school and college. She was a softball athlete in high school and lived in Scotland as a child. She is a K-pop enthusiast and likes traveling alone. Her official fanbase name is LabyRINth. She left the group in late 2025.

name: Lea
facts: She was born in Jakarta, Indonesia. She was announced as a member on May 12, 2024. She left the group in late 2025.

name: Uty
facts: She was born in Bandung, West Java, Indonesia. She was announced as a trainee member on May 12, 2024. She left the group in late 2025.

name: Ily
facts: Ily was a member of the dance cover team KINDO Project and previously debuted with the girl group Wishley. She reached the top 20 of a girlband competition in 2021. During college, she won several dance competitions and was a lead actor in campus theater. She studied Korean for 3 years and likes jazz, bossa nova, and classic music. She is now part of vocal group RAVELIA. She has a habit of touching her ears when sleepy and loves mozzarella and mentai. She left the group in late 2025.

name: Ell
facts: She was announced as a member on March 1, 2025. She left the group in 2025.

name: Zea
facts: Zea joined the group in November 2023. Her official fanbase name is Zeasthetic. She likes cooking and eating snacks. Zea plays Mobile Legends with Ute. She left the group in 2025.

name: Owy
facts: She was born in Jakarta, Indonesia. She was announced as a trainee member on May 12, 2024. She left the group in 2024.

name: Jen
facts: She was announced as a member on November 16, 2025.
